input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If tests intentionally cover OGNL's security-manager or deep JDK-access internals, they may need targeted JVM opens or test-local system properties, but that is test design/fix work rather than prerequisite setup for normal meaningful coverage.
The reported javaTest failure appears to be a behavioral/test expectation mismatch when running existing 3.2.21 tests against 3.3.5, not missing setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is a standalone expression/object-graph navigation library; its only runtime dependency, Javassist, is declared transitively by ognl:ognl:3.3.5 and will be pulled by the normal test scaffold. Meaningful coverage can be reached with in-process bean/expression tests and does not require Docker, an external service, or extra Maven dependencies.
